results.description: The Phase 4 fixture matrix has exactly 60 synthetic fixtures across the required groups
runFixtureMatrix() passes every fixture against the deterministic core modules
Both generated workflow files parse as valid JSON
Workflows have the required names
Both workflows are inactive
No node in either workflow has a credentials object
Neither workflow JSON contains secret-like literal values
Every httpRequest node targets only the internal hmz-send-state sidecar
Neither workflow references a real notification surface; placeholder only
Both workflows hardcode validation_mode/synthetic in generated Code nodes
Generated Code nodes contain no helper-level bare return-object pattern that n8n misclassifies as node output
Every generated Code node compiles as standalone n8n JavaScript
Phase 4B workflows stop on Code/HTTP failures instead of producing successful-looking output
Watchdog merge helpers reject malformed sidecar responses instead of silently treating them as empty/successful
Generated SLA Watchdog Code nodes evaluate a synthetic warning record end to end
Generated Full Test Harness Code node runs the embedded fixture matrix end to end
classifySendRecord() maps every non-terminal send state to the right watchdog category
classifyErrorRecord() maps error records to the right watchdog category
statusForAge() applies the 180s warning / 300s breach thresholds at their exact boundaries
Only SEND_UNCERTAIN belongs to the Transmission SLO; everything else (including HUMAN_REVIEW) is Processing
Processing SLO age uses durable createdAt rather than the latest transition time
buildAlertKey() is stable and contains no message bodies or raw email addresses
Phase 4A acquire/lock/forward-only state machine still works unchanged
Send state preserves createdAt and prior safe details across transitions
Sidecar sanitisation blocks raw bodies, subjects, and email addresses in arbitrary records
listUnfinishedSends() returns only non-terminal records (LOCKED/SUBMITTING/SENT/SEND_UNCERTAIN)
A resolved error record is excluded from listUnresolvedErrors()
recordAlertOnce() records an alertKey at most once (atomic open('wx'))
writePhase4bResult()/readPhase4bResult() round-trip a sanitised result with a 16-hex resultId
hmz-send-state HTTP endpoints (Phase 4A + Phase 4B) work end to end on an ephemeral local port
docker-compose.yml does not publish a host port for hmz-send-state
